lines.gurmukhi: ਲੇਖੈ ਕਤਹਿ ਨ ਛੂਟੀਐ ਖਿਨੁ ਖਿਨੁ ਭੂਲਨਹਾਰ ॥
lines.translit: lekhai kateh na chhootteeai khin khin bhoolanahaar |
lines.english: Because of the balance due on his account, he can never be released; he makes mistakes each and every moment.

lines.gurmukhi: ਸਲੋਕੁ ॥
lines.translit: salok |
lines.english: Salok:

lines.gurmukhi: ਨਾਨਕ ਸਭੁ ਕਛੁ ਪ੍ਰਭ ਤੇ ਹੂਆ ॥੫੧॥
lines.translit: naanak sabh kachh prabh te hooaa |51|
lines.english: O Nanak, everything is done by God. ||51||

lines.gurmukhi: ਓਰੈ ਕਛੂ ਨ ਕਿਨਹੂ ਕੀਆ ॥
lines.translit: orai kachhoo na kinahoo keea |
lines.english: In this world, no one accomplishes anything by himself.

lines.gurmukhi: ਬਖਸਨਹਾਰ ਬਖਸਿ ਲੈ ਨਾਨਕ ਪਾਰਿ ਉਤਾਰ ॥੧॥
lines.translit: bakhasanahaar bakhas lai naanak paar utaar |1|
lines.english: O Forgiving Lord, please forgive me, and carry Nanak across. ||1||

lines.gurmukhi: ਪਉੜੀ ॥
lines.translit: paurree |
lines.english: Pauree:

lines.gurmukhi: ਲੂਣ ਹਰਾਮੀ ਗੁਨਹਗਾਰ ਬੇਗਾਨਾ ਅਲਪ ਮਤਿ ॥
lines.translit: loon haraamee gunahagaar begaanaa alap mat |
lines.english: The sinner is unfaithful to himself; he is ignorant, with shallow understanding.

lines.gurmukhi: ਜੀਉ ਪਿੰਡੁ ਜਿਨਿ ਸੁਖ ਦੀਏ ਤਾਹਿ ਨ ਜਾਨਤ ਤਤ ॥
lines.translit: jeeo pindd jin sukh dee taeh na jaanat tat |
lines.english: He does not know the essence of all, the One who gave him body, soul and peace.

lines.gurmukhi: ਲਾਹਾ ਮਾਇਆ ਕਾਰਨੇ ਦਹ ਦਿਸਿ ਢੂਢਨ ਜਾਇ ॥
lines.translit: laahaa maaeaa kaarane deh dis dtoodtan jaae |
lines.english: For the sake of personal profit and Maya, he goes out, searching in the ten directions.

lines.gurmukhi: ਦੇਵਨਹਾਰ ਦਾਤਾਰ ਪ੍ਰਭ ਨਿਮਖ ਨ ਮਨਹਿ ਬਸਾਇ ॥
lines.translit: devanahaar daataar prabh nimakh na maneh basaae |
lines.english: He does not enshrine the Generous Lord God, the Great Giver, in his mind, even for an instant.

lines.gurmukhi: ਲਾਲਚ ਝੂਠ ਬਿਕਾਰ ਮੋਹ ਇਆ ਸੰਪੈ ਮਨ ਮਾਹਿ ॥
lines.translit: laalach jhootth bikaar moh eaa sanpai man maeh |
lines.english: Greed, falsehood, corruption and emotional attachment - these are what he collects within his mind.

lines.gurmukhi: ਲੰਪਟ ਚੋਰ ਨਿੰਦਕ ਮਹਾ ਤਿਨਹੂ ਸੰਗਿ ਬਿਹਾਇ ॥
lines.translit: lanpatt chor nindak mahaa tinahoo sang bihaae |
lines.english: The worst perverts, thieves and slanderers - he passes his time with them.

lines.gurmukhi: ਤੁਧੁ ਭਾਵੈ ਤਾ ਬਖਸਿ ਲੈਹਿ ਖੋਟੇ ਸੰਗਿ ਖਰੇ ॥
lines.translit: tudh bhaavai taa bakhas laihi khotte sang khare |
lines.english: But if it pleases You, Lord, then You forgive the counterfeit along with the genuine.

lines.gurmukhi: ਖਾਤ ਪੀਤ ਖੇਲਤ ਹਸਤ ਭਰਮੇ ਜਨਮ ਅਨੇਕ ॥
lines.translit: khaat peet khelat hasat bharame janam anek |
lines.english: Eating, drinking, playing and laughing, I have wandered through countless incarnations.

lines.gurmukhi: ਸਲੋਕੁ ॥
lines.translit: salok |
lines.english: Salok:

lines.gurmukhi: ਨਾਨਕ ਭਾਵੈ ਪਾਰਬ੍ਰਹਮ ਪਾਹਨ ਨੀਰਿ ਤਰੇ ॥੫੨॥
lines.translit: naanak bhaavai paarabraham paahan neer tare |52|
lines.english: O Nanak, if it pleases the Supreme Lord God, then even a stone will float on water. ||52||

lines.gurmukhi: ਖੇਲਤ ਖੇਲਤ ਆਇਓ ਅਨਿਕ ਜੋਨਿ ਦੁਖ ਪਾਇ ॥
lines.translit: khelat khelat aaeo anik jon dukh paae |
lines.english: Playing, playing, I have been reincarnated countless times, but this has only brought pain.

lines.gurmukhi: ਖੇਦ ਮਿਟੇ ਸਾਧੂ ਮਿਲਤ ਸਤਿਗੁਰ ਬਚਨ ਸਮਾਇ ॥
lines.translit: khed mitte saadhoo milat satigur bachan samaae |
lines.english: Troubles are removed, when one meets with the Holy; immerse yourself in the Word of the True Guru.

lines.gurmukhi: ਪਉੜੀ ॥
lines.translit: paurree |
lines.english: Pauree:

lines.gurmukhi: ਭਵਜਲ ਤੇ ਕਾਢਹੁ ਪ੍ਰਭੂ ਨਾਨਕ ਤੇਰੀ ਟੇਕ ॥੧॥
lines.translit: bhavajal te kaadtahu prabhoo naanak teree ttek |1|
lines.english: Please, God, lift me up and out of the terrifying world-ocean. Nanak seeks Your Support. ||1||

lines.gurmukhi: ਖਰੀ ਕ੍ਰਿਪਾ ਠਾਕੁਰ ਭਈ ਅਨਦ ਸੂਖ ਬਿਸ੍ਰਾਮ ॥
lines.translit: kharee kripaa tthaakur bhee anad sookh bisraam |
lines.english: When my Lord and Master showed His Great Mercy, I found peace, happiness and bliss.

lines.gurmukhi: ਖਿਮਾ ਗਹੀ ਸਚੁ ਸੰਚਿਓ ਖਾਇਓ ਅੰਮ੍ਰਿਤੁ ਨਾਮ ॥
lines.translit: khimaa gahee sach sanchio khaaeo amrit naam |
lines.english: Adopting an attitude of tolerance, and gathering truth, partake of the Ambrosial Nectar of the Name.

lines.gurmukhi: ਖਰਾ ਦਿਲਾਸਾ ਗੁਰਿ ਦੀਆ ਆਇ ਮਿਲੇ ਭਗਵੰਤ ॥
lines.translit: kharaa dilaasaa gur deea aae mile bhagavant |
lines.english: The Guru has given me great consolation, and the Lord God has come to meet me.

lines.gurmukhi: ਖੇਪ ਨਿਬਾਹੀ ਬਹੁਤੁ ਲਾਭ ਘਰਿ ਆਏ ਪਤਿਵੰਤ ॥
lines.translit: khep nibaahee bahut laabh ghar aae pativant |
lines.english: My merchandise has arrived safely, and I have made a great profit; I have returned home with honor.

lines.gurmukhi: ਨਾਨਕ ਸੋਊ ਸਰਾਹੀਐ ਜਿ ਘਟਿ ਘਟਿ ਰਹਿਆ ਬਿਆਪਿ ॥੫੩॥
lines.translit: naanak soaoo saraaheeai ji ghatt ghatt rahiaa biaap |53|
lines.english: O Nanak, praise the One, who is contained in each and every heart. ||53||

lines.gurmukhi: ਆਪਨ ਕੀਆ ਕਰਹਿ ਆਪਿ ਆਗੈ ਪਾਛੈ ਆਪਿ ॥
lines.translit: aapan keea kareh aap aagai paachhai aap |
lines.english: He Himself has acted, and He Himself acts. He was in the past, and He shall be in the future.

lines.gurmukhi: ਆਏ ਪ੍ਰਭ ਸਰਨਾਗਤੀ ਕਿਰਪਾ ਨਿਧਿ ਦਇਆਲ ॥
lines.translit: aae prabh saranaagatee kirapaa nidh deaal |
lines.english: O God, I have come to Your Sanctuary, O Merciful Lord, Ocean of compassion.

lines.gurmukhi: ਏਕ ਅਖਰੁ ਹਰਿ ਮਨਿ ਬਸਤ ਨਾਨਕ ਹੋਤ ਨਿਹਾਲ ॥੧॥
lines.translit: ek akhar har man basat naanak hot nihaal |1|
lines.english: One whose mind is filled with the One Word of the Lord, O Nanak, becomes totally blissful. ||1||

lines.gurmukhi: ਸਲੋਕੁ ॥
lines.translit: salok |
lines.english: Salok:

lines.gurmukhi: ਪਉੜੀ ॥
lines.translit: paurree |
lines.english: Pauree:

lines.gurmukhi: ਅਖਰ ਮਹਿ ਤ੍ਰਿਭਵਨ ਪ੍ਰਭਿ ਧਾਰੇ ॥
lines.translit: akhar meh tribhavan prabh dhaare |
lines.english: In the Word, God established the three worlds.

lines.gurmukhi: ਅਖਰ ਕਰਿ ਕਰਿ ਬੇਦ ਬੀਚਾਰੇ ॥
lines.translit: akhar kar kar bed beechaare |
lines.english: Created from the Word, the Vedas are contemplated.

lines.gurmukhi: ਅਖਰ ਸਾਸਤ੍ਰ ਸਿੰਮ੍ਰਿਤਿ ਪੁਰਾਨਾ ॥
lines.translit: akhar saasatr sinmrit puraanaa |
lines.english: From the Word, came the Shaastras, Simritees and Puraanas.

lines.gurmukhi: ਅਖਰ ਮੁਕਤਿ ਜੁਗਤਿ ਭੈ ਭਰਮਾ ॥
lines.translit: akhar mukat jugat bhai bharamaa |
lines.english: From the Word, comes the way of liberation from fear and doubt.

lines.gurmukhi: ਅਖਰ ਨਾਦ ਕਥਨ ਵਖੵਾਨਾ ॥
lines.translit: akhar naad kathan vakhayaanaa |
lines.english: From the Word, came the sound current of the Naad, speeches and explanations.

lines.gurmukhi: ਨਾਨਕ ਪਾਰਬ੍ਰਹਮ ਨਿਰਲੇਪਾ ॥੫੪॥
lines.translit: naanak paarabraham niralepaa |54|
lines.english: O Nanak, the Supreme Lord God remains unattached and untouched. ||54||

lines.gurmukhi: ਦ੍ਰਿਸਟਿਮਾਨ ਅਖਰ ਹੈ ਜੇਤਾ ॥
lines.translit: drisattimaan akhar hai jetaa |
lines.english: In the visible universe, the Word is seen.

lines.gurmukhi: ਅਖਰ ਕਰਮ ਕਿਰਤਿ ਸੁਚ ਧਰਮਾ ॥
lines.translit: akhar karam kirat such dharamaa |
lines.english: From the Word, come religious rituals, karma, sacredness and Dharma.

lines.gurmukhi: ਹਥਿ ਕਲੰਮ ਅਗੰਮ ਮਸਤਕਿ ਲਿਖਾਵਤੀ ॥
lines.translit: hath kalam agam masatak likhaavatee |
lines.english: With pen in hand, the Inaccessible Lord writes man's destiny on his forehead.

lines.gurmukhi: ਉਰਝਿ ਰਹਿਓ ਸਭ ਸੰਗਿ ਅਨੂਪ ਰੂਪਾਵਤੀ ॥
lines.translit: aurajh rahio sabh sang anoop roopaavatee |
lines.english: The Lord of Incomparable Beauty is involved with all.

lines.gurmukhi: ਉਸਤਤਿ ਕਹਨੁ ਨ ਜਾਇ ਮੁਖਹੁ ਤੁਹਾਰੀਆ ॥
lines.translit: ausatat kehan na jaae mukhahu tuhaareea |
lines.english: I cannot describe Your Praises with my mouth, O Lord.

lines.gurmukhi: ਸਲੋਕੁ ॥
lines.translit: salok |
lines.english: Salok:

lines.gurmukhi: ਮੋਹੀ ਦੇਖਿ ਦਰਸੁ ਨਾਨਕ ਬਲਿਹਾਰੀਆ ॥੧॥
lines.translit: mohee dekh daras naanak balihaareea |1|
lines.english: Nanak is fascinated, gazing upon the Blessed Vision of Your Darshan; he is a sacrifice to You. ||1||

lines.gurmukhi: ਪਉੜੀ ॥
lines.translit: paurree |
lines.english: Pauree:

lines.gurmukhi: ਹੇ ਅਚੁਤ ਹੇ ਪਾਰਬ੍ਰਹਮ ਅਬਿਨਾਸੀ ਅਘਨਾਸ ॥
lines.translit: he achut he paarabraham abinaasee aghanaas |
lines.english: O Immovable Lord, O Supreme Lord God, Imperishable, Destroyer of sins:

lines.gurmukhi: ਹੇ ਪੂਰਨ ਹੇ ਸਰਬ ਮੈ ਦੁਖ ਭੰਜਨ ਗੁਣਤਾਸ ॥
lines.translit: he pooran he sarab mai dukh bhanjan gunataas |
lines.english: O Perfect, All-pervading Lord, Destroyer of pain, Treasure of virtue:

lines.gurmukhi: ਹੇ ਸੰਗੀ ਹੇ ਨਿਰੰਕਾਰ ਹੇ ਨਿਰਗੁਣ ਸਭ ਟੇਕ ॥
lines.translit: he sangee he nirankaar he niragun sabh ttek |
lines.english: O Companion, Formless, Absolute Lord, Support of all:

lines.gurmukhi: ਹੇ ਅਪਰੰਪਰ ਹਰਿ ਹਰੇ ਹਹਿ ਭੀ ਹੋਵਨਹਾਰ ॥
lines.translit: he aparanpar har hare heh bhee hovanahaar |
lines.english: Most Remote of the Remote, Lord God: You are, You were, and You shall always be.

lines.gurmukhi: ਹੇ ਗੋਬਿਦ ਹੇ ਗੁਣ ਨਿਧਾਨ ਜਾ ਕੈ ਸਦਾ ਬਿਬੇਕ ॥
lines.translit: he gobid he gun nidhaan jaa kai sadaa bibek |
lines.english: O Lord of the Universe, Treasure of excellence, with clear eternal understanding:

lines.gurmukhi: ਹੇ ਠਾਕੁਰ ਹਉ ਦਾਸਰੋ ਮੈ ਨਿਰਗੁਨ ਗੁਨੁ ਨਹੀ ਕੋਇ ॥
lines.translit: he tthaakur hau daasaro mai niragun gun nahee koe |
lines.english: O my Lord and Master, I am Your slave. I am worthless, I have no worth at all.

lines.gurmukhi: ਹੇ ਸੰਤਹ ਕੈ ਸਦਾ ਸੰਗਿ ਨਿਧਾਰਾ ਆਧਾਰ ॥
lines.translit: he santah kai sadaa sang nidhaaraa aadhaar |
lines.english: O Constant Companion of the Saints, You are the Support of the unsupported.
